subcodes.first_line: O thou lamp kindled by the hand of God's love in this earthly world! Every sapling groweth by the grace of the clouds and rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای چراغ دست افروخته محبت الله در جهان ترابی هر نهالی بفیض ابری و شعاع و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
